grant_title: Mercer County FY25 Local Arts Programs (LAP) Grant Program and History Re-Grant Program
eligible_applicant_type: Non-profit organizations certified as 501(c)(3) or 501(c)(4) by the IRS
Organizations providing arts programming/services for at least two years
Organizations supporting and providing historical activities and history programming
demographic_requirements: None specified beyond geographic and organizational requirements
eligibility_summary: Open to Mercer County-based non-profit organizations (501(c)(3) or 501(c)(4)) with at least two years of arts or history programming experience. Funded by the New Jersey State Council on the Arts and New Jersey Historical Commission.
